{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "boolean_mobius_inversion"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset

variable {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] {A : Type*} [AddCommGroup A]

theorem boolean_mobius_inversion {S : Finset α} (a b : Finset α → A)
    (h : ∀ I, I ⊆ S → b I = ∑ J in Finset.powerset I, a J) :
    ∀ I, I ⊆ S → a I = ∑ J in Finset.powerset I, ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • b J :=
by
  intro I hI
  have hb : ∀ J, J ⊆ I → b J = ∑ K in Finset.powerset J, a K := by
    intro J hJ
    apply h J (Finset.Subset.trans hJ hI)
  have hsum : ∑ J in Finset.powerset I, ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • b J =
    ∑ J in Finset.powerset I, ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • (∑ K in Finset.powerset J, a K) := by
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun J hJ => ?_
    rw [hb J (Finset.mem_powerset.1 hJ)]
  rw [hsum]
  -- Use the swap lemma and the alternating sum identities
  have swap : ∑ J in Finset.powerset I, ∑ K in Finset.powerset J, ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • a K =
    ∑ K in Finset.powerset I, ∑ J in (Finset.powerset I).filter (fun J => K ⊆ J), ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • a K := by
    simpa using sum_powerset_powerset_swap (Q := I) (fun J K => ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) • a K)
  rw [swap]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun K hK => ?_
  have hK_sub : K ⊆ I := Finset.mem_powerset.1 hK
  have hsum_inner : ∑ J in (Finset.powerset I).filter (fun J => K ⊆ J), ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (I \ J).card : ℤ) = if K = I then 1 else 0 := by
    -- This is exactly alternatingSum_superset_eq_iverson_b with P=K, Q=I
    simpa using alternatingSum_superset_eq_iverson_b hK_sub
  rw [hsum_inner]
  by_cases hKI : K = I
  · subst hKI; simp
  · simp [hKI]
",
      "notes": [
        "Uses local helper lemmas `alternatingSum_superset_eq_iverson_b` and `sum_powerset_powerset_swap` from the same file.",
        "The scalar multiplication uses ℤ coefficients; the group A is an AddCommGroup, so ℤ-module structure is available.",
        "The theorem statement matches the source: for all I ⊆ S, a I = sum over J ⊆ I of (-1)^{|I\J|} * b J, with the scalar multiplication written as `((-1 : ℤ) ^ ...) • b J`."
      ],
      "status": "generated",
      "unit_key": "unit-003",
      "used_context": [
        "source theorem thm.pie.moeb",
        "local helper lemmas: alternatingSum_superset_eq_iverson_b, sum_powerset_powerset_swap",
        "Mathlib: Finset, AddCommGroup, Finset.powerset"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
